title: TensorFlow fundamentals
summary: Learn the fundamentals of deep learning with TensorFlow! This beginner friendly learning path will introduce key concepts to building machine learning models.

sections.title: TensorFlow fundamentals
sections.summary: Learn the fundamentals of deep learning with TensorFlow! This beginner friendly learning path will introduce key concepts to building machine learning models.

lessons.title: Introduction to computer vision with TensorFlow
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to perform different computer vision tasks using TensorFlow.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-computer-vision-tensorflow/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to computer vision with TensorFlow

lessons.title: Introduction to natural language processing with TensorFlow
lessons.content_md:
In this module, we explore different neural network architectures for processing natural language texts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-natural-language-processing-tensorflow/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to natural language processing with TensorFlow

lessons.title: Introduction to audio classification with TensorFlow
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to prepare audio data, create spectrograms, and build a TensorFlow keyword classification model.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-audio-classification-tensorflow/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to audio classification with TensorFlow

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica TensorFlow fundamentals
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **TensorFlow fundamentals**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
